meaning: adj.充满敬畏的,表示敬畏的
examples: The majesty of the skyscraper awed me.
Even the pirates were awed, and Tootles cried out hysterically, "I am going to do what my mother hopes."
While many people are awed by what we're doing, plenty of others are more than a little horrified.
His inner security was tempered by the humility that comes from being awed by nature.
